svg.title: AO-RRT algorithm pseudocode flowchart
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the AO-RRT build procedure from initialization through sampling, propagation, goal checking, and pruning

g.text: tree T ← {y_init}, y_best ← ∞, c_max ← track length
x_rand ← sample with goal bias, c_rand ← {0, c_max}
u_rand ← rand control, t_rand ← rand duration
Y_near ← k-nearest in T (weighted pos + cost + s(x, y))
simulate bicycle model with u_rand for t_rand steps
Update best path, c_max ← c_new, prune tree
